name: Visigoths
startIntroPart1: Great Alareiks, mighty warrior of Rome and King of the Visigoths, your men bow down before you.
startIntroPart2: O noble King, will you lend your leadership and brilliant ideas to Sweden once again, to conceive strategies never seen before? Will your new empire shine through the ages of history?
declaringWar: Our patience is now at its end. War it is!
attacked: So be it. Prepare for War!
introduction: Greetings to you! I am Alareiks, King of the Visigoths.
hateNo: We are not agreeing to that!
afterPeace: Very well, all that fighting was getting boring anyway.
tradeRequest: We bestow you the honor of this trade offer.
denounced: Don't forget who you're dealing with. Arrogant moves can get you in danger.
